retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the function is a creation routine; failure is due to resource allocation (memory, fd), which may be transient but retry is not a property of a get/put/set wrapper.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is creating a gmem file and its inode, setting up a file descriptor, and initializing a private data structure. The kvm_get_kvm call is just one step in a larger allocation and initialization sequence, not the core purpose.
